violations.text: The walk in coolers were not operational at time of inspection. Walk in coolers must hold an ambient temperature at 41 or below. New Violation. Correct By: 03/31/2025

The door to the outside, located in the loading and receiving area , is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 03/31/2025
Hot and cold running water was not available during time of inspection. Hot and cold running water must be accessible on demand. New Violation. Correct By: 03/31/2025
